description: Lock the 2026-06-27 commedia_dell_arte correction to the professional improvised Italian troupe tradition anchored by the 1545 Padua company evidence.

checks.reason: The node now uses the earliest known professional commedia company at Padua in 1545 rather than the Renaissance era placeholder.
Commedia dell'arte is a theatrical performance form, so theater remains the broad performance foundation.
The professional acting-company structure is guild-like organization context, not a claim that craft guilds invented commedia.
Vernacular and dialect performance language enables the improvised dialogue context without making fixed literary scripts required.
Stage machinery remains a technical-theater lineage, not a direct product of commedia performance practice.
